name: Craig Percoco — Technical Execution
source: Synthesized from public Percoco content — May 2026

questions.label: Trend alignment
questions.prompt: Price above 50W and 200D MA, both trending up?
questions.guidance: Weekly close above both moving averages, slopes positive.

questions.label: Higher-TF context
questions.prompt: Monthly trend in agreement with weekly setup?
questions.guidance: Counter-monthly weekly trades fail more often.

questions.label: Clear S/R
questions.prompt: Entry, stop, TP1 levels visible without interpretation?
questions.guidance: If you have to 'interpret' the chart, the setup is unclear.

questions.label: Risk-reward (VETO)
questions.guidance: VETO rule — fails this and the whole trade fails regardless of other scores.

questions.label: Volatility band
questions.prompt: ATR/price near 12mo average, not extreme high/low?
questions.guidance: Overheated or compressed vol = poor entry timing.

questions.label: Distance to S/R
questions.prompt: Entry within 1 ATR of meaningful support?
questions.guidance: Far-from-structure entries have loose stops and poor R.

questions.label: Chart cleanliness
questions.prompt: No divergences, failed breakouts, contradicting candle patterns?
questions.guidance: Judgment call — bots are unreliable here.

questions.label: Catalyst proximity
questions.prompt: No earnings / FOMC / known events within 2 weeks that could gap past stop?
questions.guidance: FT pulls earnings dates; user confirms interpretation.
